content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Graph Without Long Directed Paths". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1144/problem/F
constraints: The adjacency matrix is a binary matrix, where a[i][j] = 1 if there is a directed edge from vertex i to vertex j, and a[i][j] = 0 otherwise.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of vertices in the graph. The next n lines contain n integers each, representing the adjacency matrix of the graph.
content.outputFormat: Print the length of the longest directed path in the graph.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use depth-first search to find the longest directed path in the graph.
